name: home
content: My name is Jonatan Gabriel Bortolon, I'm a Fullstack Developer, since I was a child I'm fascinated to build toys with creativity, when I'm discovered computers my entire world changed, it's other universe with infinite possibilities, in the beginning I only played Flash games, but my curiosity talking in my head: "How games are made? I want to make games too", so from there I made my first contact with Unity3D and programming and a few years after I discovered NodeJs and I've been using it unil the present.
Development is my world, grow is my focus, every day learning different things about technologies, people and our universe.

name: socials
content: My socials where you can find me, feel free to stalk.  : )

name: works
content: I helped to port the ERP solution to mobile devices, creating the app using React Native and creating the support server to serve the data using AdonisJS.
I helped maintain the company's flagship, the CRM, and also helped in the development of internal and customer solutions through Laravel, ReactJS, React Native and NodeJS technologies.
I worked as a Junior Frontend developing interfaces in the VTEX and VTEX.IO platform for clients.

name: projects
content: This is some projects that I developed.
This project was a Software Engineer work that consist in build a system using all knowledge obtained in class.
We build a simple ERP system with management of employees, clients, products, stocks and sales using AdonisJS, Tailwind CSS and AlpineJS.
I made this project to learn NextJS and Konva with a beautiful galaxy map with StarWars planets and it's informations using StarWars public API swapi.dev.
A simple parser for a C like language, C+-, using JFlex and JCup developed in Compilers class.
